name: Dirtybird
submission_requirements: Name, email, track title, confirm rights, state if exclusive. They listen to all; no feedback guaranteed; demos may be played on socials/streams.
why: Claude VonStroke. Fun quirky lane; launches careers.

name: Repopulate Mars
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud or Dropbox links ONLY (no GDrive/WeTransfer). Max 4 demos; private playlist if multiple. Downloads ON. Extended mixes preferred. Also covers South Of Saturn & North Of Neptune.
why: Lee Foss. Where Mau P broke through. Open to demos.

name: Hellbent
submission_requirements: Unreleased tech house; private link via submission portal. Built to foster unknown artists.
why: Cloonee. Built for unknowns; charts constantly.

name: Three Six Zero
why: Dom Dolla / Eats Everything / Noizu. Open submissions; growing fast.

name: Solid Grooves
submission_requirements: Email demo. EXTREMELY high volume — very low response rate. (Verify exact address; sources vary on spelling.)
why: Michael Bibi & PAWSA. UK tech house institution.

name: Sola
submission_requirements: Private SoundCloud links. (A secondary route music@solardo seen — verify.)
why: Solardo. Consistent charting; email demos welcome.

name: Hot Creations
submission_requirements: Upload PRIVATELY to SoundCloud and join the Hot Creations SoundCloud group; include contact details. Reputationally selective.
why: Jamie Jones & Lee Foss. Deep scene credibility.

name: Toolroom
submission_requirements: Portal preferred (LabelRadar-backed); email demos@toolroomrecords.com. Listen to all, reply only if interested.
why: Mark Knight. Solid distribution; long track record.

name: Defected
submission_requirements: LabelRadar; drag-drop MP3. Follow guidelines or auto-deleted. One submission covers sub-labels (DFTD, Glitterbox, Classic, D4D4Dance, Big Love, Soulfuric, Nu Groove, etc.).
why: Huge catalogue; one send covers ~11 sub-labels.

name: Knee Deep In Sound
submission_requirements: Email demos (alt: kdisdemos@gmail.com). Melodic / less-competitive lane.
why: Hot Since 82. A less-competitive melodic lane.

name: Club Sweat
submission_requirements: DropTrack portal (DropTrack Pro skips queue). Email A&R: towelhandles@sweatitoutmusic.com. Sub-label of Sweat It Out — wonkier/deeper club.
why: Australian reach; good for emerging artists.

name: Space Yacht
submission_requirements: Tune Reactor LIVE reviews on Twitch Mon & Thu 4pm PT (small donation for live feedback). Also a LabelRadar portal. Most transparent route in the scene.
why: Reviews demos live on Twitch — the most transparent route in the scene.

name: Black Book
submission_requirements: OPEN PORTAL. Tech house/house 124-130 BPM. Private SoundCloud/streaming link (not a raw file) + short bio + release history. Allow 2-4 weeks; no follow-ups in that window. NOTE: reclassified from needs_warm_intro — they run an open portal.

name: Catch & Release
submission_requirements: Routed via Insomniac Music Group label page; website submission. Selective — elite reach. Verify current demo route.
why: Fisher. Massive reach and chart dominance.

name: Experts Only
submission_requirements: NO open demo portal (confirmed). Highly selective; talent found via referrals / scene presence. Best path: find A&R on LinkedIn, mutual connections, private demo link, no attachments.
why: John Summit. Peak of the scene.

name: Drumcode
submission_requirements: Website demo; very high volume. A long game, not a cold target — ensure strong fit. Predominantly techno.
why: Adam Beyer. Scene-defining — a long game.
